More to the point, Congress could have avoided adding a new subparagraph and simply amended Section 1374(d)(7)(B)(ii) by adding 2012 and 2013.
By not simply adding 2012 and 2013 to the current subparagraph (B), Congress has created confusion out of what should have been a very straightforward amendment to existing law.
